seo_title: AI Age Filter — See Yourself Older or Younger | LazyKiwi
seo_description: Try the AI age filter from LazyKiwi. Upload one photo and see a realistic older or younger version of yourself in seconds — age progression made easy.

hero.title: See yourself older — or younger.
hero.description: Upload one photo and watch yourself age forward or back in seconds. The AI adds or smooths years naturally while keeping you, you.

what_it_is.title: Travel through time with one photo.
what_it_is.intro: The LazyKiwi AI age filter realistically ages your face forward or backward — adjusting skin, hair and structure — so you can meet your future self or your younger one, believably and instantly.

steps.title: Upload your photo
steps.description: A clear, well-lit photo is all you need. Your photo, your starting point.

steps.title: Pick older or younger
steps.description: Choose older or younger and how far to go.

steps.title: Generate & download
steps.description: Preview the result, try a few more, then download your favourite.

features.title: Aging that looks natural
features.description: Lines, skin texture and hair change the way they really would, not with a cartoon overlay.

features.title: Forward to 70, back to 10
features.description: Preview your future self or rewind the years — and everything in between.

features.title: A reveal worth sharing
features.description: Great for curiosity, family resemblance games and viral before-and-after posts.

cards.title: Seconds, not days
cards.description: Results render almost instantly, so you can compare options before your coffee's cold.

cards.title: Private by default
cards.description: Your photos are processed securely and never sold. What you upload stays yours.

cards.title: Free to start
cards.description: No credit card to try. Get a real result on your own photo at zero cost.

cards.title: No regret
cards.description: Test the change risk-free and decide with your own eyes.

cards.title: Made for you
cards.description: Tuned for natural, believable results — not a filter slapped on top.

cards.title: No skills needed
cards.description: No Photoshop, no prompts to master. Upload, tap, done.

quotes.quote: I was nervous to try this, saw it on my own photo in seconds, and I'm obsessed. So much easier than guessing.
quotes.name: Mia R.

quotes.quote: Showed the LazyKiwi preview instead of trying to describe what I wanted. First time I got exactly what I pictured.
quotes.name: Daniel K.

quotes.quote: My before/after post blew up — it looks real because the age actually fits. Total game changer.
quotes.name: Priya S.

faqs.question: Is the age filter free?
faqs.answer: Yes. Upload a photo and see an older or younger version for free.

faqs.question: Will it still look like me?
faqs.answer: Yes. The AI ages your real features while keeping your identity recognizable.

faqs.question: Can it make me younger too?
faqs.answer: Yes — age forward or backward, with adjustable intensity.

faqs.question: What photo works best?
faqs.answer: A clear, front-facing selfie with good lighting.

cta.title: Meet your future — and past — self.
cta.description: Upload one photo and see a realistic older or younger you in seconds — free.
